nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I mostly just use AI for pre-planning or brainstorming for teleplays

nodes.label: AI feedback as useful but fallible
nodes.grounding_span: It felt like it was just telling me what I wanted to hear, tbh, basically affirming that I did a good job

nodes.label: AI as future music composition enabler
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to handle complex rhyme schemes
nodes.grounding_span: For songwriting, I've asked for rhymes or if the syllable pattern makes sense

nodes.label: AI as compromise to creative integrity
nodes.label_negative: Unauthorized use of creative work for AI training
nodes.grounding_span: I had some reservations of 'feeding' my own creative work to the model

nodes.label: AI as complement to human-centered work
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human workers
nodes.grounding_span: AI should only be used as a supplement to, not a replacement for, human work

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I think I'm still driving the creative decisions

nodes.label: Honest and accurate feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I crave feedback all the time and have a thick skin

nodes.label: Fair compensation and consent for creators
nodes.grounding_span: writer's creative work being used to train models without their permission

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: It has definitely sped up my research process

nodes.label: Dissatisfaction with AI sycophancy
nodes.grounding_span: It felt like it was just telling me what I wanted to hear

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: decision makers might use it to replace people

nodes.label: Resistance to delegating creative work
nodes.grounding_span: writer's creative work being used to train models without their permission

nodes.label: Hope for improved AI feedback and technical capability
nodes.grounding_span: Ideally, the models will get smarter and be able to offer constructive feedback

nodes.label: Intentional boundary-setting between AI and creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I try to have a hardline between my own creative contributions and the AI research

nodes.label: Thick-skinned craving for honest critical feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I crave feedback all the time and have a thick skin
